nameMeanings.name: VON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: LICHTENBERG
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Horst, Bernd, Heinz, Wilhelm.
German and Dutch: habitational name from any of numerous places called Lichtenberg in Germany and the Netherlands.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial compound name formed with German Licht ‘light’ (genitive Lichten) + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

variants.name: Lechtenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Fritz.

variants.name: Lichtenberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Dieter, Horst, Kurt.
German: habitational name for someone from any of numerous places called   Lichtenberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG was born in 1221, in Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr, was 31 and his mother, Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER, was 22. He married Elisabeth von Baden before 1253. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1271, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG est né en 1221, à Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elisabeth von Baden avant 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1271, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG 1221 in Lichtenberg, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr 31 und seine Mutter Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER 22. Er hat vor 1253 Elisabeth von Baden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1271 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG è nato il nel 1221 nel Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elisabeth von Baden prima del 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1271, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERGが1221年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンリチテンバーグで生まれた時，父Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herrは31歳，母Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILERは22歳であった。1253年以前にElisabeth von Badenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG(이)가 1221년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 리ch텐버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1253년 이전 Elisabeth von Baden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG nasceu em 1221, em Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth von Baden antes 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1271, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG родился в 1221 г. в местности личтенбирг, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth von Baden перед 1253 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1271 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ludwig II VON LICHTENBERG nació en 1221, en Lichtenberg, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elisabeth von Baden antes de 1253. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1271, a la edad de 50 años.
